scripts.bench:detection: start-server-and-test bench:serve http://localhost:5199 "pnpm exec tsx tests/accuracy/bench-detection.js"
scripts.bench:e2e: start-server-and-test bench:serve http://localhost:5199 "pnpm exec tsx tests/accuracy/bench-e2e.js"
scripts.bench:cold-load: start-server-and-test bench:serve http://localhost:5199 "pnpm exec tsx tests/accuracy/bench-cold-load.js"
scripts.bench: start-server-and-test bench:serve http://localhost:5199 "pnpm exec tsx tests/accuracy/bench-detection.js && pnpm exec tsx tests/accuracy/bench-e2e.js && pnpm exec tsx tests/accuracy/bench-cold-load.js"
scripts.sweep: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run format && pnpm run tests && pnpm run bench
scripts.construct: pnpm run sweep && pnpm run build
